name: Author Talk: Local History of the Severn River
summary: Join us Thursday, July 16 at 6:30 PM for an evening with local historian Ruth Calloway on the Severn River watershed.

name: GED Tutoring Sign-Ups Open for Fall
summary: Fall GED tutoring sessions run Thursdays 10 AM to noon. Register at the front desk or online to reserve a spot with a volunteer tutor.

name: Community Book Drive Collection Week
summary: Drop off gently used books at the Annapolis Library lobby July 6 through July 11 to support the volunteer lending shelf.

name: Volunteer Appreciation Reception
summary: Coordinator Gloria Whitfield invites all volunteers to a thank-you reception in the community room on Saturday, August 8 at 2 PM.

name: Evening Author Talk: Environmental Policy and the Chesapeake
summary: Retired policy analyst and volunteer tutor Juan Hernandez leads a public discussion on land-management policy in the Bay region, Thursday, September 24 at 6 PM.

name: Fall Children's Story Hour Returns
summary: Weekly story hour for young readers resumes in September. Volunteer readers are still being scheduled for the fall calendar.

name: Thursday Tutors Needed for Fall Term
summary: We are recruiting volunteer tutors for the Thursday morning GED program. Contact Gloria Whitfield to schedule an orientation.

name: New Volunteer Orientation Schedule
summary: Monthly orientation sessions for new library volunteers are held the first Tuesday of each month at 5 PM in the community room.

name: Please Submit Your Volunteer Hours Log
summary: A reminder to log your volunteer hours through the front desk or the online form by the end of each month for our program records.

name: Book Drive Volunteers Wanted
summary: Help sort and shelve donations during the July community book drive. Sign up for a two-hour shift at the volunteer desk.

name: GED Math Practice Packet
summary: Printable arithmetic, algebra, and geometry practice sheets for use in Thursday tutoring sessions.

name: Reading Comprehension Study Guide
summary: A tutor-prepared guide to help GED students build reading comprehension and short-answer writing skills.

name: Tutor Handbook and Session Guidelines
summary: Guidelines maintained by coordinator Gloria Whitfield for volunteer tutors, covering check-in, materials, and student privacy.

name: Free Practice Test Resources List
summary: A curated list of free online and print GED practice tests recommended by our volunteer tutors.
